name: DILLARD'S, INC.
summary: . Dillards,Inc. (Dillards, the Company, we, us, our or Registrant) ranks among the nations largest fashion apparel, cosmetics and home furnishing retailers. The Company, originally founded in 1938 by William T. Dillard, was incorporated in Delaware in 1964 (and was reincorporated in Texas in 2025).
